title: Pay the Alternate Fuel Levy
description: Pay the monthly or annual levy for vehicles that are not powered by petrol or diesel.
summary: If your vehicle is not powered by petrol or diesel – for example, an electric or hybrid car – you must pay the Alternate Fuel Levy.
The levy is $25 BBD per month or $300 BBD per year. It has been in place since April 2023.

items: whether you want to pay monthly or annually

how_long: Payment is processed the same day.

options.heading: In person
content: Pay at the Barbados Revenue Authority. The Licensing Authority will record the payment against your vehicle.

contact.address:
